name: Mythic Mire
short_description: A surreal RPG-adventure set in a world between dreams and nightmares. Explore strange environments with your trusty digital Pixie companions.
detailed_description:
Overview

Mythic Mire is an RPG-adventure that takes place in a liminal world between dreams and nightmares. Faeya must find out what happened to her fellow townsfolk and reach the end of The Tower to discover the mysteries of this universe. Along her way, she joins up with the digital Pixies, each one with a unique and distinct ability, including Mire and Billiards. Fight surreal monsters in turn-based combat, befriend NPCs, and find clues to continue forward.

Story

Faeya is enjoying a warm summer day gardening in her pastoral town... when something sinister happens to the other townsfolk, altering her reality forever! Along her way she finds Mye, Que, and Zed: 3 digital “Pixies” who become her companions, each with a unique power. Befriend the quirky denizens of this new dream-like world, such as the inhabitants of Hedgehog Island, space aliens, and more. Can Faeya and her Pixie pals figure out what happened to Faeya's town?

Features

  • JRPG structure, with turn-based battles and 4 party members to control.

  • Retro CGI FMV sequences like those from the PS1-era, used in cutscenes and spell animations.

  • Distinct and unique abilities for each party member, some being very unconventional. Master the power of Spells, Mire, Billiards, and Shine.

  • Eclectic soundtrack featuring moody atmospheres, quaint town music, metal, and more.

  • Hand-drawn pixel art to tickle your fancy.

  • Cute animal-people!

  • Surreal worlds with dream-like and nightmarish creatures... and eccentric NPC’s!
